abstract.t: This document specifies the use of EAP-TLS with TLS 1.3 while remaining backwards compatible with existing implementations of EAP- TLS. TLS 1.3 provides significantly improved security, privacy, and reduced latency when compared to earlier versions of TLS. EAP-TLS with TLS 1.3 provides significantly improved protection against pervasive monitoring by mandating use of privacy. This document updates RFC 5216.
